professionals.name: Dr. Ivánfi Judit
professionals.bio: General practitioner in Harkány. Education listed as POTE 1995-2001, degree 2001; family medicine specialization 2013. Additional studies and residency training at PTE; prior long-term substitute practice in Hosszúhetény and Olasz-Belvárdgyula-Hásságy.
